title: Harry Styles is number one as fans embrace Kiss All The Time. Disco Occasionally
description: The star sells 183,000 albums as fans give a hearty embrace to Kiss All The Time. Disco Occasionally
content:
Harry Styles has topped the UK album charts for a third time with his latest album, Kiss All The Time. Disco Occasionally.
According to the Official Charts Company, the record sold more than 183,000 copies after its release last Friday, eclipsing the... [3416 chars]

title: Cheltenham Festival ends with four horse death
description: Envoi Allen and Saint Le Fort both died on Friday on the last day of Cheltenham Festival.
content:
Four horses have died at this year's Cheltenham Festival – two on the final day.
Envoi Allen, which finished ninth in the Boodles Cheltenham Gold Cup Chase, collapsed just after the race.
Saint Le Fort was put down after falling at the final obstacle... [3277 chars]

title: Driver who went on skiing holiday months after killing teens given 14 months' youth detention
description: Madeleine Lonsdale, 18, earlier pleaded guilty to two counts of causing death by careless or inconsiderate driving.
content:
A driver who went on a skiing holiday months after killing two teenage passengers has been sentenced to 14 months' youth detention.
Madeleine Lonsdale, 18, had been racing another car at 100mph before she struck a tree in Marston, Lincolnshire, on 20... [2174 chars]

title: Bahrain and Saudi Arabia GPs to be cancelled amid Middle East war
description: The Bahrain and Saudi Arabia Grands Prix scheduled for next month are set to be cancelled as a result of the Middle East war.
content:
The Bahrain and Saudi Arabia Grands Prix that were scheduled for next month are set to be cancelled as a result of the war in the Middle East.
A formal decision to call off the races has not yet been made but is expected before the end of the weekend... [880 chars]
